summary: Outstanding matrix mix captures a high‑energy, peak‑performance Dead show; the sound is peerless.
review: Reviewers rave about this MTX (matrix) mix, calling it one of the best ever with crystal‑clear, technically superb audio. The band is described as rested and energetic, delivering a performance at the height of their abilities, making this recording a must‑add despite an isolated complaint about a missing VBR stream file.

ai_rating.rationale: All detailed reviews praise both the show and the matrix recording as exceptional; only one brief negative note concerns a missing file, not the audio quality itself.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as peerless, crystal‑clear, with superb mastering; MP3 version praised, FLAC desired. One reviewer noted a missing VBR stream file, but this is a distribution issue rather than a sound quality problem.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on overall energy and performance level.
